description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: vetting, tests, and deploy. In the vetting stage add a lint job (allow_failure: true) using the golang image that runs `go get github.com/golang/lint/golint` then `golint -set_exit_status ./...`. Also in vetting add a vet job using the golang image that runs `go vet ./...`. In the tests stage add a unit_race_tests job using the golang image that runs `go test -race ./...`. In the deploy stage add a staging job that runs only on the master branch, updates apt, installs ruby-dev, installs the dpl gem, and runs `dpl --provider=heroku --app=gitlab-heroku-deploy-staging --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY` to deploy to the Staging environment. Also add a production job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, sets the Production environment, performs the same apt and dpl steps but deploys to the gitlab-heroku-deploy-prod app using the $HEROKU_API_KEY.
